stories.title: Follow live: Messi scores as Argentina tie Egypt w...
Late Cowboys' player Kneeland diagnosed with CTE
stories.summary: Former Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland has been posthumously diagnosed with CTE.

stories.title: Sources: Finals MVP Brunson having wrist surgery
stories.summary: Knicks guard Jalen Brunson had surgery on his left wrist, and the Finals MVP is expected to return to basketball activities later this summer, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Geno: Clark fouls not a 'referendum on America'
stories.summary: Geno Auriemma says on-court confrontations involving Caitlin Clark should not be viewed as a "referendum on America."

stories.title: Cavs' Mitchell agrees to $273M max extension
stories.summary: Donovan Mitchell has agreed to a four-year, $273 million maximum extension with the Cavs, including a player option for the 2030-31 season, per his agent.
